calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-22-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mary Gemma O'Keefe for petitioner Karen Dobrusky (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on the Petition for Order Appointing Successor trustee.

The Court inquired whether there is or will be a separate probate proceeding for the estate of Ella Lamuth. Ms. O'Keefe explained that they were only trying to appoint a successor trustee at this time and stated that there were no objections to the petition.

Following discussion, the Court took the petition under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Lydia Villarreal; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-11-2025 Continued To Sep-22-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
